Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MIKEL D. BRYAN, ESQ. of Mikel D. Bryan, P.C., Tel No. 707-528-1231 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. GREGORY J. BROD, ESQ. of Brod Law Firm APC, Tel No. 415-397-1130 appearing for the Defendants.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS SAVOY DEVELOPMENT LLC, LEO CASSIDY, AND JAMES NUNEMACHER'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. Defendants' motion to vacate the arbitration award set for February 10, 2016 is off calendar. Even though they were non-signatories to the Limited Co-Ownership Agreement, Mr. Francis and Mr. McCarthy succeeded in compelling arbitration of the disputes between them and the plaintiffs. Hall v. Superior Court (1993) 18 Cal.App.4th 427, 435-436 is controlling and mandates confirmation of the award. Hall provides that the arbitrator derives his powers from the arbitration agreement and a civil complaint does not limit the scope of the arbitration. The arbitrator acted within his powers within the meaning of Code of Civil Procedure 1286.2(a)(4) by resolving a dispute arising out of the Limited Co-Ownership Agreement. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS' PROPOSED JUDGMENT NOT SIGNED. PLAINTIFFS MUST REVISE AND RESUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT THAT SPECIFIES A DOLLAR AMOUNT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
